message.content:
@startuml
actor "laboratory coordinator" as labCoord

participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as LabUI
participant ":ValidateTestReportController" as Controller
participant ":Company" as Company
participant "rp : TestStore" as TestStore
participant "rp : Test" as Test
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TestReportStore
participant "rp : TestReport" as TestReport
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TestDiagnosis

labCoord -> LabUI : 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis
LabUI -> Controller : 2 createTestList()
Controller -> Company : 3 get = testReportsToValidate()
Company -> TestStore : 4 get = testReportsToValidate()
TestStore -> Test : 5 get = getTestList()
Company -> TestReportStore : 6 get = testReportsToValidate()
TestReportStore -> TestReport : 7 get = getTestReportList()
TestReport -> TestDiagnosis : 8 get = getTestDiagnosis()

ref over Controller, LabUI : US15_SD_testReportsDTO.puml

Controller -> LabUI : 9

LabUI --> labCoord : 10 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection
labCoord -> LabUI : 11 chooses all tests

LabUI --> labCoord : 12 asks for confirmation
labCoord -> LabUI : 13 confirms selection

LabUI -> Controller : 14 validateAllTestReport()

loop
    Controller -> TestStore : 15 validateTestReport(testId);
    TestStore -> Test : 16 setState(VALIDATED);
    Controller -> TestStore : 17 registerValidationDate(date);
    TestStore -> Test : 18 setValidationDate(date);
end

LabUI --> labCoord : 19 informs operation success

@enduml
